_comment: SKILL-DESKTOP-TAURI X8 #304 SPDX allowlist. Shared across both ecosystems — cargo (src-tauri/) and npm (root). Default-deny GPL/AGPL; allow permissive + MPL-2.0. src-tauri/deny.toml mirrors these for the cargo-deny path; the npm side is enforced via license-checker through backend/software_compliance/licenses.py.
